body:
private static final File BIG_FILE =
            new File(System.getProperty("java.io.tmpdir"), "worldcitiespop.txt");
private static final String TEST_RESRC = "org/apache/commons/csv/perf/worldcitiespop.txt.gz";
private static final CSVFormat format = CSVFormat.EXCEL;
private static final long[] ELAPSED_TIMES = new long[max];
private static int num; // number of elapsed times recorded
private static int max = 11; // skip first test

        pass

body: final int fields;
final int count;
testParser("CSV", () -> CSVParser.CSVParser1(createReader(), format));

testParser(
                "CSV-PATH",
                () ->
                        CSVParser.parse1(
                                Files.newInputStream(Paths.get(BIG_FILE.toURI())),
                                StandardCharsets.ISO_8859_1,
                                format));

testParser(
                "CSV-PATH-DB",
                () ->
                        CSVParser.parse3(
                                Files.newBufferedReader(
                                        Paths.get(BIG_FILE.toURI()), StandardCharsets.ISO_8859_1),
                                format));

testParser(
                "CSV-URL",
                () ->
                        CSVParser.parse5(
                                BIG_FILE.toURI().toURL(), StandardCharsets.ISO_8859_1, format));
CSVParser createParser() throws IOException;
translation: raise NotImplementedError("Subclass must implement abstract method")
